text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yasss! Party gal season's finally here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, isn't this legit the exact same way we
started summer vacay last year?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pair of besties have their sights set on the
autumn Tenno Sho, and they're devoting this
summer camp to preparing for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho... McQueen's obvs gonna
run in it. But she's not the only rival to worry
about...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
For sure! But aren't the vibes even more lit this
year? Like, they're becoming more fire than the
fall leaves! ☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the competition is likely to be quite fierce
this year.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Ikuno! Feeling good and full of energy?
You're still rockin' the specs, I see! ☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm typically always wearing glasses, except
when I'm sleeping.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Ikuno Dictus. Her conduct is like that of a
neat and orderly secretary, and she's quite close
to Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku Helios.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Do you have the scoop on this year's autumn
Tenno Sho, Ikuno?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: To a degree.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Nature said that she will take part. I will be
running as well.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you two'll be competing in it as well? ☆ The
autumn Tenno Sho is practically gonna be a
Halloween party with the whole fam, then! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is a friendly, girl-next-door kind of
Umamusume. She also happens to be good
friends with Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku Helios.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Additionally, Mejiro McQueen will be running. As
for the biggest name on the list...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That will be Tokai Teio. She is also scheduled to
join the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio... McQueen's biggest rival's gonna be
running too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio. When it comes to Umamusume with
star power, she's in a league of her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Mejiro McQueen and Tokai Teio will both be
competing in the race, chances are they'll get the
most coverage, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Teio? Sure! McQueen? Bring her on! Heck, come
one, come all! I'm up for racin' anyone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Nothing's gonna shake us! Isn't that right, bestie?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wahey! Who's shooketh? Not us, that's for sure!
Ba-boom! ★

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Lemme hear you say it now! Who's gonna shine
brightest on the track?

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Us besties, that's who! WAHEYYYYY! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the line-up of big names, Mejiro Palmer
isn't starstruck or scared in the slightest. A
summer of mad vibes is about to get started.
